mapper.select: SELECT username, nickname, name FROM tbl_user WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
SELECT plant_id, plant_name, plant_name_kor, plant_image, plant_searchcount FROM tbl_plant WHERE plant_name LIKE INITCAP('%' || #{q} || '%') OR plant_name_kor LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' AND ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT PLANT_ID, PLANT_NAME, PLANT_NAME_KOR, PLANT_IMAGE, PLANT_SEARCHCOUNT FROM tbl_plant WHERE PLANT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR PLANT_NAME_KOR LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ORDER BY PLANT_SEARCHCOUNT DESC

SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.PRODUCT_PRICE, p.PRODUCT_DELIVERY_PRICE, NVL(p.PRODUCT_SALE, 0) AS product_sale,
(SELECT SAVED_NAME FROM tbl_product_image WHERE PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID AND IS_THUMBNAIL = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbnail,
NVL((SELECT AVG(REVIEW_RATE) FROM tbl_product_review WHERE PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID), 0) AS product_rate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_product_review WHERE PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID) AS review_count FROM tbl_product p WHERE p.PRODUCT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_ID DESC
mapper.sql:
SELECT b.BOARD_ID AS boardId, b.TITLE AS title, (SELECT NICKNAME FROM tbl_user WHERE USER_ID = b.USER_ID) AS writer, TO_CHAR(b.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(b.CONTENT, 100, 1) AS contentPreview, b.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, b.LIKE_COUNT AS likeCount, b.REPLY_CNT AS replyCnt, b.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, b.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, b.PRICE AS price, CASE WHEN b.BOARD_TYPE = 'T' AND b.TRADE_STATUS = 'P' THEN 'sell' WHEN b.BOARD_TYPE = 'S' AND b.TRADE_STATUS = 'P' THEN 'share' WHEN (b.BOARD_TYPE = 'T' OR b.BOARD_TYPE = 'S') AND b.TRADE_STATUS = 'C' THEN 'done' ELSE '' END AS status, '/community/detail?id=' || b.BOARD_ID AS moveUrl,
(SELECT SAVED_NAME FROM tbl_board_file WHERE BOARD_ID = b.BOARD_ID AND IS_THUMBNAIL = 'Y' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbSavedName, (SELECT SUB_DIR FROM tbl_board_file WHERE BOARD_ID = b.BOARD_ID AND IS_THUMBNAIL = 'Y' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS thumbSubDir FROM tbl_board b WHERE b.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND b.BOARD_TYPE IN ('G', 'T', 'S')
mapper.select: AND b.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ORDER BY b.BOARD_ID DESC
AND DBMS_LOB.INSTR(b.CONTENT, #{q}) > 0 ORDER BY b.BOARD_ID DESC
AND b.USER_ID IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM tbl_user WHERE NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR USERNAME LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ) ORDER BY b.BOARD_ID DESC
mapper.sql: SELECT b.BOARD_ID AS id, b.TITLE AS title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(b.CONTENT, 100, 1) AS preview, (SELECT NICKNAME FROM tbl_user WHERE USER_ID = b.USER_ID) AS writer, b.VIEW_COUNT AS views, b.LIKE_COUNT AS likes, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_board WHERE PARENT_ID = b.BOARD_ID AND BOARD_TYPE = 'A' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y') AS answers FROM tbl_board b WHERE b.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND b.BOARD_TYPE = 'Q'
mapper.select: AND b.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ORDER BY b.BOARD_ID DESC
AND DBMS_LOB.INSTR(b.CONTENT, #{q}) > 0 ORDER BY b.BOARD_ID DESC
AND b.USER_ID IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM tbl_user WHERE NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR USERNAME LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ) ORDER BY b.BOARD_ID DESC
